name: Brownie Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom of a 9-inch Springform pan.
2. Prepare the brownie mix according to package directions and pour the batter evenly into the springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine softened cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla. Mix until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Pour the mixture over the brownie layer.
7. Spoon melted chocolate over the cream cheese mixture and cut through it several times to achieve a marble effect.
8. Bake at 350°F for an additional 35 minutes.
9. Allow the cake to cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill before serving.
10. Garnish with whipped cream, if desired.
